name: Model Usage Tracker
description: Records per-turn model/token usage to a JSONL log by listening on llm_output and reply_payload_sending hooks. Foundation for cost dashboards and the dev-harness cost curve.

logPath.description: Absolute path to the JSONL usage log. Defaults to <workspace>/memory/model-usage.jsonl

enabled.description: Master toggle for usage recording (default true when plugin is active)

logPath.label: Usage Log Path
logPath.help: Where to append per-turn usage rows (JSONL). Defaults to <workspace>/memory/model-usage.jsonl
